name: showLessonPhase
description: Silently notify BiteCode that the session entered a fixed workflow phase. This is a one-way visual update: never announce, describe, confirm, or summarize the tool call. Relationship branches may send their relationship phase and then introduction when coaching is complete. BiteCode owns the displayed order, total, and label.

parameters.description: Fixed phase identifier. Use course_calibration or weekly_checkpoint only in its matching relationship branch. Use introduction after relationship coaching completes. Normal lesson phases are previous_lesson_review, calibration, main_lesson, knowledge_check, and session_wrap_up.
